vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on /var/log/messages File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /var/log/messages, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0600 /var/log/messages

triage_decision.reason: The finding concerns adjusting file permissions on /var/log/messages using a safe chmod command; it does not involve critical system services, authentication mechanisms, or filesystem partitioning, making it low-risk and suitable for automated remediation.
